item.title: Burnout Spotlight
item.description: A performance-focused moment showcasing a vehicle doing a controlled burnout. The video highlights power, sound, and reaction. What makes burnouts so popular to watch?

media:content.media:title: Burnout Spotlight
media:content.media:description: A performance-focused moment showcasing a vehicle doing a controlled burnout. The video highlights power, sound, and reaction. What makes burnouts so popular to watch?

item.title: We Have to Start It
item.description: A critical moment where an engine or project vehicle is started after significant repairs or modifications. The video captures testing and initial results. What’s the most nerve-wracking part of a first start?

media:content.media:title: We Have to Start It
media:content.media:description: A critical moment where an engine or project vehicle is started after significant repairs or modifications. The video captures testing and initial results. What’s the most nerve-wracking part of a first start?

item.title: Testing a School Bus’s Skills
item.description: A school bus is put to the test in a hands-on driving challenge to see how it handles unusual conditions and terrain. The video focuses on performance, reactions, and experimentation. How capable do you think a school bus can be outside normal roads?

media:content.media:title: Testing a School Bus’s Skills
media:content.media:description: A school bus is put to the test in a hands-on driving challenge to see how it handles unusual conditions and terrain. The video focuses on performance, reactions, and experimentation. How capable do you think a school bus can be outside normal roads?

item.title: GTO Keys Go Missing on Power Tour
item.description: A road trip takes an unexpected turn when the keys to a GTO go missing during a Power Tour event. The video follows the situation, reactions, and attempts to solve the problem. What would be your first step in this situation?

media:content.media:title: GTO Keys Go Missing on Power Tour
media:content.media:description: A road trip takes an unexpected turn when the keys to a GTO go missing during a Power Tour event. The video follows the situation, reactions, and attempts to solve the problem. What would be your first step in this situation?

item.title: 5.9 Cummins 600HP Build
item.description: A performance-focused build centered around upgrading a 5.9 Cummins engine toward the 600-horsepower range. The video highlights fabrication, tuning, and mechanical setup work. What’s your favorite diesel performance upgrade?

media:content.media:title: 5.9 Cummins 600HP Build
media:content.media:description: A performance-focused build centered around upgrading a 5.9 Cummins engine toward the 600-horsepower range. The video highlights fabrication, tuning, and mechanical setup work. What’s your favorite diesel performance upgrade?

item.title: Unusual Oil Condition Found
item.description: A mechanical inspection reveals unexpected oil condition during a routine engine check. The video follows diagnosis and potential repair decisions. What do you think unusual oil usually indicates?

media:content.media:title: Unusual Oil Condition Found
media:content.media:description: A mechanical inspection reveals unexpected oil condition during a routine engine check. The video follows diagnosis and potential repair decisions. What do you think unusual oil usually indicates?

item.title: Wiring a Challenging Workshop Setup
item.description: A hands-on workshop project focused on wiring and organizing a complex garage setup. The video follows troubleshooting, planning, and electrical installation work. What part of workshop setup do you think is the hardest?

media:content.media:title: Wiring a Challenging Workshop Setup
media:content.media:description: A hands-on workshop project focused on wiring and organizing a complex garage setup. The video follows troubleshooting, planning, and electrical installation work. What part of workshop setup do you think is the hardest?

item.title: Ford’s V10 Mustang Build
item.description: A unique engine swap build featuring a Ford V10 installed into a Mustang platform. The video explores fabrication work, tuning, and custom engineering. What’s your opinion on unconventional engine swaps?

media:content.media:title: Ford’s V10 Mustang Build
media:content.media:description: A unique engine swap build featuring a Ford V10 installed into a Mustang platform. The video explores fabrication work, tuning, and custom engineering. What’s your opinion on unconventional engine swaps?

item.title: Mini-Ex Gets a Second Look
item.description: A detailed inspection and follow-up work on a mini excavator after initial evaluation. The video focuses on diagnostics and mechanical assessment. What’s the most important check on used equipment?

media:content.media:title: Mini-Ex Gets a Second Look
media:content.media:description: A detailed inspection and follow-up work on a mini excavator after initial evaluation. The video focuses on diagnostics and mechanical assessment. What’s the most important check on used equipment?

item.title: 6.0 Powerstroke Review
item.description: A detailed breakdown of the 6.0 Powerstroke engine covers its strengths, weaknesses, and common reliability issues. Why is this engine so debated?

media:content.media:title: 6.0 Powerstroke Review
media:content.media:description: A detailed breakdown of the 6.0 Powerstroke engine covers its strengths, weaknesses, and common reliability issues. Why is this engine so debated?

item.title: Gives the K-Car a Fresh Wrap
item.description: A classic K-Car gets a fresh exterior wrap, giving it a renewed look while preserving its original character. How much can appearance change a build?

media:content.media:title: Gives the K-Car a Fresh Wrap
media:content.media:description: A classic K-Car gets a fresh exterior wrap, giving it a renewed look while preserving its original character. How much can appearance change a build?

item.title: 1999 Chevy Gets a Cummins Upgrade
item.description: A 1999 Chevy receives a Cummins engine upgrade, combining classic truck styling with diesel power and torque-focused performance. What changes when a gas truck goes diesel?

media:content.media:title: 1999 Chevy Gets a Cummins Upgrade
media:content.media:description: A 1999 Chevy receives a Cummins engine upgrade, combining classic truck styling with diesel power and torque-focused performance. What changes when a gas truck goes diesel?

item.title: DT466 Fargo: Old Army Truck Build
item.description: An old Fargo army truck powered by a DT466 engine is restored and modified into a functional heavy-duty machine. What challenges come with military truck builds?

media:content.media:title: DT466 Fargo: Old Army Truck Build
media:content.media:description: An old Fargo army truck powered by a DT466 engine is restored and modified into a functional heavy-duty machine. What challenges come with military truck builds?

item.title: Pro Welder Reviews a $70 Amazon Welder
item.description: A budget-friendly $70 welder is tested by a professional to see how it performs in real workshop conditions. Can ultra-cheap tools actually hold up?

media:content.media:title: Pro Welder Reviews a $70 Amazon Welder
media:content.media:description: A budget-friendly $70 welder is tested by a professional to see how it performs in real workshop conditions. Can ultra-cheap tools actually hold up?
